title: dalea bartonii
intro: Dalea bartonii, also known as Barton's Prickly Pear or Desert Rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dalea bartonii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dalea bartonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
